name: visionary-claude
description: Visual design plugin for Claude Code. 189 styles, 8-step selection algorithm with weighted random, Motion v12 + CSS-first generation, axe-core-instrumented Playwright critique loop, DTCG token export, cross-session taste calibration, multi-variant and consistency-apply commands. WCAG 2.2 AA + APCA compliant. 15 frameworks, 20+ languages.
